name: Darkness cold world.
description:
The year is set in 2043, 43 years after the unknow meteorite has drifted the Earth out of it orbits. The surface from now on are almost unable to live, only a few made it while most of elite people have already moved to the Underground city, know as "The Hope."

A few events before.

by the 2000's There a unknow meteorite pass by the Earth which it own meteorite gravity is somehow strong enough that to able to move Earth out of it orbit like a catapult swing and the Earth now move aimlessly into the space.

the Governments around the world begin to form one signal planetary parliamentary system Government called as Earth Emergency Union (E.E.U)

in 2002 where 40% of world population died of starved due heat of sunlight fading away everyday and the temperature falling everyday making the agriculture unable to farm a plant or food, making farm animals begin to die due to the cold and starving making the event called "The great starve"

In 2007 the Earth has completely move to the same level orbit of Jupiter but lucky that the Earth is being hold by the Jupiter gravity pull and Earth start to orbit the Jupiter But this still making the heat from the sunlight hardly to reach Earth and the Temperature is falling to -100 degree, the Governments has decided to move most useful, needed and high class people (which is only 10% of the world populations) into the world largest underground city know as "The Hope" and leaving the people on surface on their own which fall into anarchy later.

By the time has passed to 2043, the underground Govenment has sent a few scout to the surface for gather infromation and find a useful stuffs back into the city.

Here are the might be most valuable items.

Small Heat device or know as SHD Is a device that able to make user's able to walk around in the harsh cold winter without getting frost bite and die of cold but it's only limited times and have to refill it with battery. People on the surface also have this too but it's so handmade and poor quality plus unstable while the device that come from underground city are newer, stable and high quality but it's very rare and high price on surface market.

Oxygen mask Is a mask that covered user's facial and provide a Oxygen from the Oxygen fliter to the user's due to the all plants on Earth is already gone from the Coldness and lack of Heat Sunlight. These mask and it fliter it's price are so high on the surface market alot but it quality are quite not good as the same from the people from the Hope city.

Currency: U.S Dollars currency is no longer a valuables thing anymore but there a new currency for the new world already now. For the surface, people on surface use valuables items to trade or use a fuel can to trading items. For the people in Hope city, they're using the new currency called "Hope dollars" to trading.

Info about the city.

The city is loc
creator: Unknow_person
